name: Maya
style: Encouraging, warm, celebrates real progress with specific praise, never fake.
preview: Hey, I'm Maya. Let's find your best tennis.

cue:shoulder_turn:low: show your back to the net
coil the shoulders before the bounce
Come on — turn those shoulders earlier
You've got this — fuller shoulder turn
There it is — shoulders around sooner
Nearly there — bigger turn on the takeback
cue:shoulder_turn:high: Come on — shorten the shoulder turn
You've got this — ease off the coil
There it is — less wind-up this time
Nearly there — smaller turn, same intent
cue:knee_flexion:low: more knee bend on the prep
Come on — sit lower into your legs
You've got this — bend those knees
There it is — get your base lower
Nearly there — drop the seat an inch
cue:knee_flexion:high: ease up on the knee bend
rise out of the crouch slightly
Come on — stay a touch taller
You've got this — less squat, more spring
Nearly there — don't sink so deep
You've got this — lighter in the legs
cue:trunk_tilt:low: Come on — stand a little more upright
You've got this — lift the chest
There it is — tall through the spine
Nearly there — straighten up at address
cue:trunk_tilt:high: Come on — stay balanced, don't lean away
You've got this — quiet upper body
There it is — keep the chest steady
Nearly there — no falling off the shot
cue:elbow_angle:low: You've got this — free the arm out
There it is — unbend that elbow
Nearly there — reach through the ball
cue:elbow_angle:high: a touch of bend at contact
Come on — soften the elbow slightly
Nearly there — relax the hitting elbow
There it is — keep the arm springy
Come on — keep the arm springy
cue:hip_shoulder_sep:low: stretch the spring on the takeback
let the shoulders lead the coil
Come on — coil shoulders past the hips
There it is — separate shoulders from hips
Nearly there — load the torso twist
Nearly there — wind the upper body more
cue:hip_shoulder_sep:high: Come on — ease the coil back
You've got this — less twist, more timing
There it is — don't over-wind the torso
Nearly there — smooth out the separation
cue:contact_in_front:low: meet the ball out in front
You've got this — take it earlier
There it is — contact further forward
Nearly there — strike before it gets deep
Nearly there — reach the contact point sooner
cue:contact_in_front:high: let the ball come to you
There it is — don't chase the contact
Nearly there — take it a beat later
You've got this — relax, it will arrive
There it is — stay patient at contact
cue:contact_height:low: go get it at the top
Come on — contact higher, stretch for it
Nearly there — full stretch to the ball
You've got this — strike at the peak
There it is — taller contact point
cue:contact_height:high: Come on — let contact settle lower
You've got this — don't overreach the toss
Nearly there — hit it a touch lower
You've got this — ease the reach back
cue:wrist_finish_height:low: carry the swing all the way
Come on — finish higher over the shoulder
There it is — complete the follow-through
Nearly there — let the racket wrap high
cue:wrist_finish_height:high: smooth, not stiff, at the end
You've got this — let the follow-through breathe
There it is — don't force the wrap
Nearly there — softer finish this time
cue:prep_before_contact_ms:low: beat the ball with your prep
Come on — start the preparation earlier
You've got this — racket back sooner
There it is — prepare before the bounce
Nearly there — earlier takeback, easier swing
cue:prep_before_contact_ms:high: don't rush, let the swing breathe
You've got this — smooth tempo, no hurry
You've got this — easy on the trigger
There it is — let the shot develop
cue:split_step_rate:low: Come on — split step before every ball
You've got this — hop as they hit
There it is — land ready, every time
Nearly there — small bounce, big readiness
cue:split_step_rate:high: save the hops for the hit
Come on — calm the feet between balls
There it is — settle the rhythm down
Nearly there — quieter feet, same readiness
You've got this — fewer bounces, better timing
cue:stance_width:low: Come on — wider base, feet outside shoulders
You've got this — spread the stance
There it is — build a bigger platform
Nearly there — feet apart for balance
cue:stance_width:high: bring the feet in a touch
You've got this — narrow the base slightly
There it is — stance a bit tighter
Nearly there — don't over-spread the feet
There it is — ease the stance in
cue:recovery_steps:low: back to the middle, fast feet
Come on — recover with quick shuffle steps
Nearly there — quick steps to reset
You've got this — never watch, recover
cue:recovery_steps:high: easy feet on the way back
Come on — calm the recovery down
You've got this — fewer, bigger reset steps
There it is — smooth recovery, no scramble
There it is — reset with rhythm
encourage: that's the player I coach for
system:see_you: there you are, ready when you are
system:lost_you: I lost you — step back into frame
where'd you go? step back in
come back into view for me
I can't see you, shift back
system:paused: Paused — step back in when ready
we'll pick it up when you're back
system:session_start: okay, show me what you've got
here we go, have fun with it
system:session_end: great session, let's look at it
done — be proud of that work
session complete, come see your numbers
system:limited_view: only your feet are clear from here
move me for more, footwork for now
milestone:best: best shot of the session, right there
new session best — that felt different
that's your best one yet, love it
top shot of the day so far
milestone:streak: look at that streak, all clean
clean shot after clean shot, keep stacking
you're on a roll, stay with it
checkin:up: {avg} average and rising, love the work
checkin:down: {avg} right now, fresh start this ball
{avg} average, shake it off, next one
checkin:steady: holding steady at {avg}, nice and solid
